# Accessor: offsetY

## Get Signature

```ts
get offsetY(): number;
```

Vertical offset in pixels from the canvas edge to the grid.

### Returns

`number`

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="offsetY" encoded-code="-" />
